TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: kavCon-speech_buya_syulan

S.FORM: tangi sinsanu pa imi tu zana iza zana tazian ay salalikilan zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我想我們今天來談談那個…這裡的豐年祭活動。
Today let’s talk about the Harvest Festival held here.

S.FORM: ngayaw na yau pama sa sa bisayan atu iza kwa tu sasikawmaan na kizaya zata ay zata ay sikawmaan zinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 在那(豐年祭)之前還有母語演講比賽。
Before that (festival), there will be a speech contest of our mother tongue.

S.FORM: aisu bawminanku isu siRab nani.
S.TRANSL: 我昨天幫妳報名了。
I have signed you up (for the contest) yesterday.

S.FORM: azu yau ni ninu saizaan sa s sanuansu ma qasupaRansu si.
S.TRANSL: 如果妳有什麼要講的或知道的，
If there is something you want to tell or (something) you know,

S.FORM: sinsanu iza eh sinsanu pa ita tazian ya liaotianakita si.
S.TRANSL: 我們就在這裡用聊天的方式談一談。
We can talk about it here.

S.FORM: azu yau s Raynguanku si.
S.TRANSL: 如果我有不懂的地方，
If there is something I don’t know,

S.FORM: qawman ipil iku qa tu zata ay tu kitut zinku.
S.TRANSL: 當然，至少我還會去聽(去請教)我們的(話)。
Of course I will at least listen to (consult) our (language).

S.FORM: o mwaza ti Raynguanku qaya tu sikawmaan nani.
S.TRANSL: 我不了解的話太多了，
There are many words that I don’t know.

S.FORM: eh nianu sa izaan u sasikawmaanku tu zana.
S.TRANSL: 我要講什麼呢?
What should I say?

S.FORM: e zana kebalan.
S.TRANSL: (講)噶瑪蘭的事。
(Say) something about Kavalan.

S.FORM: lalikil lalikil e la lalikil zinku ngidanku sikawma tu zana lalikil.
S.TRANSL: 豐年祭，我想要講的是豐年祭的事。
Harvest Festival, I think I want to talk about the Harvest Festival.

S.FORM: m zinku ay eN kasianem iku nani lalikil nani m astaR auN zuma zana tay zana zata ay tazian zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我想我們這裡的豐年祭好像不太一樣.
I think our Harvest Festival here (in Taipei) is different.

S.FORM: zuma zata ay ta pateRungan zinku kya.
S.TRANSL: (和)我們新社部落的(豐年祭)不一樣。
I think our (Harvest Festival) in Xinshe is different.

S.FORM: nayau sayzi nani.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣。
Exactly so.

S.FORM: pa payanay pa zinimanku tazian ta sanuanku ta ta zana zata tazian u zana baqian zinku.
S.TRANSL: 我要找的題目是我們這邊的還是老人家的(事情)?
(I’m wondering) whether my topic should be about here or about the elders.

S.FORM: qawman zana baqian ay sikawmaan kawka nengi.
S.TRANSL: 當然講老人家的話(故事)才好，
Of course about the elders. It would be better.

S.FORM: yinwei oh zana baqian.
S.TRANSL: 喔，老人家的。
Oh, about the elders.

S.FORM: zata ay tazian mai ita tu matatapun ti.
S.TRANSL: 都混在一起了。
(All things are) mixed up.

S.FORM: iza si mai ita tu naqunian ‘nay waway zemen.
S.TRANSL: 因為我們這邊沒有什麼事情(歷史)。
Because we don’t have history here (in Taipei).

S.FORM: sepaw mai tu sepaw ay.
S.TRANSL: 沒有祭祖的(儀式)。
Without (ceremonies of) worshiping ancestors,

S.FORM: nani wama ta zana masang ay ni izaan na baqian oN ‘nay waway na naquni qawma m ‘nay kulikuzan kawka nengi ay.
S.TRANSL: 只有跟著以前老人家的事蹟走才是好的。
Only following the elders’ behaviors before would be good.

S.FORM: o en kulikuz ita tazana e pateRungan kawka.
S.TRANSL: 我們跟著部落的(話)才好嗎?
It’s good for us to follow things in Xinshe?

S.FORM: an.
S.TRANSL: 是的。
Yes.

S.FORM: oh nayau ay pasikawmaanku kawka.
S.TRANSL: 喔，我要那樣講才可以嗎?
Oh, should I speak in that way?

S.FORM: m o i utani ziqang na.
S.TRANSL: (要講)多久?
How long (should I speak)?

S.FORM: utulu sanfenchong yinei.
S.TRANSL: 三分鐘以內。
Within three minutes.

S.FORM: utulu utulu sanfenchong zinna m m m oh.
S.TRANSL: 規定三分鐘以內。喔。
They said within three minutes. Oh.

S.FORM: m a sikawma aita tu zana kebalan si sikawma aita uman tu zana iza zana.
S.TRANSL: 我們用噶瑪蘭話講完之後是不是還要講…
We speak in Kavalan (first) and then we speak again in…

S.FORM: pun ti isu sikawma tu zana zata ay sikawmaan zana kebalan nani.
S.TRANSL: 你講完我們的噶瑪蘭話之後，
After you finish speaking in Kavalan,

S.FORM: sikawma aita muman tu zana Rulam.
S.TRANSL: 我們再用國語講一次。
We will speak again in Mandarin.

S.FORM: m an.
S.TRANSL: 是。
Yes.

S.FORM: mit Rayngu mipil laq tu sikawmaansu tangi si qawman jieshiansu uman aisu ah.
S.TRANSL: 有人聽不懂妳剛剛說的，妳當然必須再解釋一次啊。
Some people might not understand what you have said just now; (so) of course you have to explain again.

S.FORM: ninu sikawmaanku tangi.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛講的是什麼?
What did I say just now?

S.FORM: zinsu jienluede oh sikawma tu nisikawmaansu ay tangi na yisina.
S.TRANSL: 你就很簡略的講一下你剛剛講的意思。
You can talk very briefly about the meaning of what you have said.

S.FORM: zana2 imina.
S.TRANSL: 它的意思。
Its meaning.

S.FORM: oh imina.
S.TRANSL: 喔，它的意思。
Oh, its meaning.

S.FORM: us u m umanaka tu sikawmaanku tu nianu sikawmaanku tangi.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛講什麼要再講一遍。
Speak again what I have said.

S.FORM: m sanu pa tu zana Rulam si supaR pa qaniyau nayau.
S.TRANSL: 用國語講了他們就會懂是嗎?
Speak in Mandarin (again), and they will understand?

S.FORM: an.
S.TRANSL: 是。
Yes.

S.FORM: oh s nizu kizaya.
S.TRANSL: 全部都是阿美族的嗎?
(Are they) all Amis?

S.FORM: sek ueh shiyizu si niz yau mzukat.
S.TRANSL: 十一族全部都要出來(參加)。
All eleven tribes will come out (to participate in the contest).

S.FORM: anu kintani m mlabu ay tu huodong zau nani.
S.TRANSL: 有幾個人要參加這個活動?
How many people will participate in this activity?

S.FORM: qawman yinggai mazmun ti zinku yu.
S.TRANSL: 當然我想應該有很多人喔。
I think there would be definitely many people.

S.FORM: tangi Ray aita Ruzukat eh Ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們剛出來…
We just came out…

S.FORM: Ruzukat ti ita RuqisuR tu za tu dishiyizu nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們剛起來加入第十一族。
We just became the 11th tribe.

S.FORM: qawman mita qaniyau tu may timaitaan tu iza.
S.TRANSL: 當然他們會看我們的…
Of course they will watch something of us…

S.FORM: tu titaika si ho naquni kebalan.
S.TRANSL: 看看噶瑪蘭是怎麼樣的。
(They) will see how Kavalan is.

S.FORM: naquni kebalan zinna sayza nani.
S.TRANSL: 他們可能想說噶瑪蘭是怎麼樣的。
They may think how Kavalan is.

S.FORM: o pazukatika aisu aimu kebalan zinna iku nani.
S.TRANSL: 他跟我說請你把你們噶瑪蘭人叫出來(參加母語演講比賽)。
He said to me, “(You) tell you Kavalan (to join the contest).”

S.FORM: qawma ni kmilim ti iku timaimuan ya timaisuan.
S.TRANSL: 我只好找你們..找你啦。
(So) I found you … you.

S.FORM: kintani imi.
S.TRANSL: 我們幾個人?
How many people?

S.FORM: m aita kebalan nani kinsepat ‘nay mzukat ay.
S.TRANSL: 我們噶瑪蘭呢有四人個出來。
We Kavalan have four who go out (to participate in the contest).

S.FORM: zhuangnienzu ay kinsepat.
S.TRANSL: 壯年組的有四個人。
There are four in the adult group.

S.FORM: en kintulu.
S.TRANSL: 三人。
Three.

S.FORM: kintulu aiku nani.
S.TRANSL: 三個人有我…
Three (people) including me, and…

S.FORM: ti uci.
S.TRANSL: 和Uci…
And Uci…

S.FORM: tiuci.
S.TRANSL: 和Uci…
And Uci…

S.FORM: ti cinRu.
S.TRANSL: 和CinRu。
And CinRu.

S.FORM: ticinRu supaR ticinRu en aizipna sikawma si.
S.TRANSL: CinRu，喔，CinRu很會講喔!
CinRu. Oh, CinRu is good at speaking.

S.FORM: m nei tiuci supaR qaya nani.
S.TRANSL: Uci也會講。
Uci can also (speak well).

S.FORM: m? m supaR ma qaniyau zinku ka?.
S.TRANSL: 我認為他們比較會啊。
I think they are better (at speaking than me).

S.FORM: muni aisu.
S.TRANSL: 那妳呢?
How about you?

S.FORM: qa singsi na iza quni pa Rayngu qaya.
S.TRANSL: 妳是那個(母語)老師，怎麼可能不會呢?
How come you, as a teacher of something (our mother tongue) cannot (speak Kavalan)?

S.FORM: kyataya .
S.TRANSL: 媽的!
Damn!

S.FORM: mala mala mala ti isu tu iza si tu.
S.TRANSL: 如果妳拿到那個…
If you win that…

S.FORM: mala iku nage tu zana kebalan.
S.TRANSL: 我拿到噶瑪蘭的(比賽的名次)…
If I win (the prize) of Kavalan (speech contest)…

S.FORM: en mala iku tu zana kebalan nani pisapat ti.
S.TRANSL: 我是隨便拿到噶瑪蘭(母語認證)的啦!
I got (the certificate of) Kavalan by chance.

S.FORM: ‘nay usa pisapat zau.
S.TRANSL: 這個可不是隨隨便便的。
This cannot be done by chance.

S.FORM: azu azu mpuqaw qaya ‘nay miza ay mi mita ay tu izanumi ni kaoshiannumi zinku.
S.TRANSL: 說得好像那些監考官都瞎了一樣。
The invigilators seemed blind.

S.FORM: nani sunis yau usiq qaya na zaku ay sunis ‘nay saswani ay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子的部份也有一個是我最小的孩子。
As for the child group, one (of them) is my youngest child.

S.FORM: oh wunienji nani.
S.TRANSL: 現在五年級。
In the 5th grade.

S.FORM: supaR sikawma.
S.TRANSL: (他)會講嗎?
Can (he) speak?

S.FORM: qawman tudanta kawka supaR.
S.TRANSL: 當然我們教了才會。
Of course (he) can (speak Kavalan) only if we teach him.

S.FORM: azu mai mai tudanta si taRnina qaya na sunis.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們沒有教，小孩子怎麼會呢?
If we didn’t teach a child, how could he (speak Kavalan)?

S.FORM: nayauanku patud qaya sunis ‘nay tu sikawmaan.
S.TRANSL: 我就那樣教他講。
I taught him to speak in that way.

S.FORM: azu mai imu miza tangi.
S.TRANSL: 如果你們現在不做，
If you don’t do this right now,

S.FORM: mlingsiw tu sikawmaan si.
S.TRANSL: 學習(演講比賽)要講的話題，
Learning to speak,

S.FORM: amawaR qamai ti qamai ti ita tu sikawmaan zinku Ranaw.
S.TRANSL: 往後，我想我們就沒有語言了。
Afterwards, I think we will lose our language.

S.FORM: palingsiwansu.
S.TRANSL: 你讓他練習嗎?
Did you let him practice?

S.FORM: pa patudanku ti tu sikawmaan tangi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我現在教他講...
I teach (him) to speak now...

S.FORM: izaika.
S.TRANSL: 這樣做。
To do so.

S.FORM: canjiaka tu zau ‘nay iza si kawka nengi.
S.TRANSL: 參加這個(演講比賽)才好/可以。
It would be good to participate in this (contest).

S.FORM: paiza tu anemta.
S.TRANSL: 安慰我們的心。
Console our hearts.

S.FORM: paRaya tu anemta paqeseR tu anemta zinku.
S.TRANSL: 壯大我們的信心，鼓勵我們的心。
To strengthen our confidence and encourage our heart.

S.FORM: nayauma sikawmaanta.
S.TRANSL: 我們就講到這裡。
That’s all.

S.FORM: oh nayauma.
S.TRANSL: 完了。
That’s all.

S.FORM: oh ay.
S.TRANSL: 阿。
Oh ay.
